4.0 out of 5 stars iPhone 17 - 256 GB - Black - The media could not be loaded. EXPERIENCE - Awesome Upgrade from iPhone 14. Best Promotion 120Hz Display. Powerful A19 chip makes day to day tasks run so smoothly. Very Good compact form factor makes in hand feel Super comfortable for longer usage. Nice cameras with added Center stage selfie makes the overall photography experience delightful. Solid and sturdy built. Overall a very Balanced and value for money iPhone in all the aspects for a normal user. Also got INR 6K Instant discount on MRP using HDFC Bank Credit Card. I’m satisfied & happy with this upgrade.***Following are some issues that I faced while setup and while using my new iPhone 17.ISSUES - ***Migrating from your old iPhone to new one is now not a very smooth process. There are lot of hit and misses in the setup even if you have your old iPhone. Apple will also prompt you to update both your phones to latest ios26 versions during migration and mind it, the update size will be over 10GB in your new phone and will require time and very reliable Wi-Fi connection. I would suggest to update your new iPhone 17 first through MacBook to get the hassle free setup. I did the same as the my iPhone was stuck on software update screen for a long time while updating it directly through Wi-Fi and it was not at all a good experience with the new phone stuck on update screen. Luckily I was able to figure out a workaround using my MacBook. You can also try the setup process through iCloud back-up which I did not try as I was MacBook handy.***ios26 still not fully optimized causing minor glitches and battery drain issues. However pretty sure that these are the teething issues that Apple will fix it in coming days.Hope this feedback/review helps. Thanks

5.0 out of 5 stars A Worthy Upgrade with a Few Rough Edges - I recently upgraded from an iPhone 13 to the new iPhone 17, and overall, it feels like a solid leap forward.Pros: • The larger display is stunning — bright, smooth, and very responsive to touch. • The new processor makes everything lightning fast and fluid. • Connectivity and signal strength have improved noticeably. • The Always-On Display (AOD) looks great and the screen offers higher brightness levels than the iPhone 13. • The camera system captures wider, sharper shots with better detail and color. • Battery life easily lasts a full day with normal use (around 7–8 hours with heavy use).Cons: • Speaker volume feels slightly lower than the iPhone 13. • Haptic feedback is weaker compared to older models. • It ships with iOS 26, which still has a few bugs — though I’m confident updates will smooth things out soon.Overall:The iPhone 17 is a refined, powerful upgrade that delivers excellent performance and display quality. A few small drawbacks aside, it’s a fantastic choice for anyone ready to move on from earlier models

5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent Performance & Premium Experience – iPhone 17 (256 GB) - I’ve been using the iPhone 17 (256 GB) for a while now, and it’s easily one of the best smartphones I’ve owned. Apple has refined both performance and design, making this phone feel truly premium.The performance is incredibly smooth. Apps open instantly, multitasking is effortless, and even heavy gaming runs without lag. The 256 GB storage is more than enough for photos, videos, apps, and downloads—I don’t have to worry about running out of space.The display is stunning: bright, sharp, and very responsive. Watching videos, scrolling, and reading feel comfortable even for long periods. The camera quality is excellent, especially in low light. Photos come out clear, detailed, and natural-looking, and video recording is very stable.Battery life has also been impressive. With normal daily use, the phone easily lasts a full day. Charging is fast and reliable. iOS runs smoothly and feels secure, polished, and user-friendly as always.Overall, the iPhone 17 (256 GB) is a great choice for anyone looking for a fast, reliable, and high-quality smartphone. It’s expensive, but you definitely get what you pay for. Highly recommended!
5.0 out of 5 stars I phone 17 black colour - One of the best i phone 17 battery life good value for money camera awesome performance unbeatable most durableFunction all are awesome

5.0 out of 5 stars iPhone 17 - I’ve been using the iPhone 17 for a few weeks, and overall it’s one of the best base iPhones Apple has made. The design feels premium with a solid aluminium frame and Ceramic Shield glass, and the phone is comfortable to hold.The display is excellent — a 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR OLED screen with a 120Hz ProMotion refresh rate. This makes scrolling and animations very smooth, and the screen stays bright and clear even in sunlight.Performance is strong thanks to the A19 chip, so everyday tasks, social apps, and even games run without lag. Multitasking feels responsive, and heavy apps open quickly.The camera system is impressive for its class with 48MP main and ultrawide cameras. Photos are sharp and natural in colour, and the front 18MP Center Stage camera works very well for selfies and video calls.Battery life easily lasts a full day with regular use, and fast charging up to 50% in about 20 minutes is very convenient.

5.0 out of 5 stars Very good Central stage front camera - The iPhone 17 delivers a balanced flagship experience for everyday users, bringing some long-overdue upgrades like a 120Hz Super Retina XDR display, better battery life, and a faster A19 chip.
